name: create_contact
description: Create a new contact in your Intercom workspace. A contact can be a 'user' (authenticated customer with an external_id) or a 'lead' (anonymous visitor identified by email). Set profile fields like email, name, phone, and any custom attributes. If a contact with the same external_id or email already exists, the API will return an error. Returns the created contact object with the Intercom-assigned ID.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: The contact role: 'user' (identified, authenticated customer) or 'lead' (anonymous visitor or prospect).

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The contact's email address. Required for leads. Recommended for users.

parameters.name: external_id
parameters.description: Your application's unique identifier for this user. Required for users. Must be unique across your workspace.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: The contact's phone number in international format.

parameters.name: avatar
parameters.description: URL to the contact's avatar image.

parameters.name: custom_attributes
parameters.description: Key-value object of custom attributes. Keys must be pre-defined in your Intercom workspace settings. Values can be strings, numbers, booleans, or dates (Unix timestamps).

parameters.name: unsubscribed_from_emails
parameters.description: Whether the contact has opted out of email communication. Default is false.
